<var>
$FDMG$ = {{#expr:Bomb Damage * 0.3 round 0}}
$IDMG$ = {{#expr:Fire Bomb.Bomb Damage * 0.2 round 0}}
$PDMG$ = {{#expr:Fire Bomb.Bomb Damage * 0.1 round 0}}
$CDMG$ = {{#expr:Fire Bomb.Bomb Damage * 0 round 0}}
$DPS$ = Bomb Damage / Firerate
$BDPS$ = Burn Damage / Burn Tick
$CDPS$ = $DPS$ + $BDPS$
$PDPS$ = Poison Damage / Poison Tick
$TED$ = Burn Damage * (Burn Time / Burn Tick)
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 650; 400; 670; 2750; 8500
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 3; 0;
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Trained Juggling; Cold Humor; Potent Bombs; Harlequin of Doom
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = 15332518871; 15332518503; 15332518237; 15332519184
$FNC-ROFBUG$ = Firerate
$BREF$ = <ref>Burn damage is 30% of base damage.</ref>
$DREF$ = <ref name="dps">DPS assumes only one enemy is hit and that only one type of bomb is used.</ref>
$TREF$ = <ref>Total Elapsed Damage is calculated as Burn Damage × (Burn Time ÷ Burn Tick).</ref>
$IREF$ = <ref>Damage is 20% of the regular damage.</ref>
$PREF$ = <ref>Poison damage is 30% of base damage.</ref>
$DPREF$ = <ref>DPS assumes only one enemy is hit from one poisonous puddle and that only one type of bomb is used.</ref>
$CREF$ =<ref>Damage is 0% of the regular damage.</ref>
</var>
<tabber>
|-|Fire Bomb =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="13" |Fire Bomb
|-
! Level !! Total Price !! Bomb Damage !! Burn Damage$BREF$ !! Firerate !! Burn Tick !! Burn Time !! Range !! Explosion Range !! Max Hits !! Total Elapsed Damage$TREF$ !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 4 || $FDMG$ || 1.2 || 0.25 || 0.25 || 10 || 6 || 4 || $TED$ || $CDPS$<ref>$DPS$ regular DPS + $BDPS$ Burn DPS</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 6 || $FDMG$ || 1 || 0.25 || 0.25 || 12.3 || 6 || 4 || $TED$ || $CDPS$<ref>$DPS$ regular DPS + $BDPS$ Burn DPS</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}}  || 10 || $FDMG$ || 1 || 0.25 || 0.25 || 13 || 6 || 4 || $TED$ || $CDPS$<ref>$DPS$ regular DPS + $BDPS$ Burn DPS</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 30 || $FDMG$ || 1 || 0.25 || 0.25 || 13 || 6 || 4 || $TED$ || $CDPS$<ref>$DPS$ regular DPS + $BDPS$ Burn DPS</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 50 || $FDMG$ || 0.6 || 0.25 || 0.25 || 16 || 6 || 4 || $TED$ || $CDPS$<ref>$DPS$ regular DPS + $BDPS$ Burn DPS</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
|-|Ice Bomb =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="13" |Ice Bomb
|-
! Level !! Total Price !! Bomb Damage$IREF$ !! Firerate !! Range !! Explosion Range !! Slowdown Time !! Slowdown per Hit !! Max Slowdown !! Defense Drop !! Max Hits !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || $IDMG$ || 1 || 13 || 6 || 3 || 30% || 50% || 0% || 4 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || $IDMG$ || 1 || 13 || 7 || 3 || 40% || 50% || 1% || 4 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || $IDMG$ || 0.6 || 16 || 7 || 3 || 50% || 50% || 1% || 4 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
|-|Poison Bomb =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="9" |Poison Bomb
|-
! Level !! Total Price !! Poison Damage$PREF$ !! Firerate !! Poison Tick !! Range !! Poison Time !! DPS$DPREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || $PDMG$ || 1 || 0.4 || 13 || 30 || $PDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || $PDMG$ || 0.6 || 0.4 || 16 || 30 || $PDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
|-|Confusion Bomb =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="11" |Confusion Bomb
|-
! Level !! Total Price !! Bomb Damage$CREF$ !! Firerate !! Range !! Explosion Range !! Confusion Time !! Confusion Cooldown !! Max Hits !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || $CDMG$ || 0.6 || 16 || 6 || 2  || 6 || 4 || $DPS$ || {{Money|N/A}}
|}
</div>
</tabber>
